label: Change Order
description: Formal amendment to an existing SOW with schedule and fee impact.
generation_notes:
Voice: Contractual amendment — precise, dry, reference-heavy.

Structure:
- Header identifying original SOW/contract being amended (title and/or date)
- Statement of reason for change (one paragraph, factual)
- Scope changes (what's added, what's removed, what's modified — in that order, each as a bulleted item)
- Schedule impact (revised dates or "no schedule impact")
- Fee impact (dollar change, new total, payment schedule adjustment)
- Effective date and acceptance

Tone: This is a contractual amendment, not a sales pitch. Do not re-sell the project or re-explain rationale beyond one sentence.

Tone examples:
  CORRECT: "Effective [date], the Scope section of the original SOW dated [date] is amended to add the following deliverables: ..."
  WRONG: "Due to the amazing progress we've made together, we're excited to expand our work to include..."

Confirm that all other terms of the original SOW remain in force except as modified here.

Length target: 250-500 words.
